tool: Context Feedback Fuzzer v2.1 - context + feedback + marker verification + confirmation engine - authorized testing only

marker_based_fuzzing.description: Each payload is tagged with a unique marker, then a verification engine re-checks collected pages for marker reflection.

findings.reason: status=200; different from 404 baseline; length delta; parameter changed response shape; marker reflected: cff_marker_name_xss_reflection_probe_642f926155; marker hits: 1; canary payload was reflected in response body; unique marker reflected: cff_marker_name_xss_reflection_probe_642f926155
findings.conclusion: Có dấu hiệu/nguy cơ: Possible Reflected XSS
findings.evidence: canary payload was reflected in response body; unique marker reflected: cff_marker_name_xss_reflection_probe_642f926155
findings.confirmation_reason: Marker duy nhất được phản chiếu trong response hiện tại.
findings.title: Vulnerability: Reflected Cross Site Scripting (XSS) :: Damn Vulnerable Web Application (DVWA)
findings.evidence_summary: canary payload was reflected in response body; unique marker reflected: cff_marker_name_xss_reflection_probe_642f926155
findings.research_note: Finding được sinh ra từ context-aware, feedback-based và marker-based verification.
